title: clausena anisata var. paucijuga
intro: Clausena anisata var. paucijuga is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the 'Nigerian lime' or 'African bush lime'. It has been traditionally used in West African medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clausena anisata var. paucijuga include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Clausena anisata var. paucijuga can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent.
